name: Hershey Bar Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the Hershey bars and syrup together.
2. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Mix in the cooled chocolate mixture thoroughly.
4. Alternately add flour and buttermilk to the chocolate mixture, mixing gently after each addition.
5. Fold in the chopped pecans and vanilla.
6. Pour the batter into a tube pan and bake for 1¼ hours at 350°F.
CHOW DOWN!
